```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/logging.py",
  "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nimport logging\r\nimport sys\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict\r\n\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JsonFormatter(logging.Formatter):\r\n    \"\"\"Simple JSON log formatter with common correlation fields.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:\r\n        base: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n            \"ts\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\r\n            \"level\": record.levelname,\r\n            \"logger\": record.name,\r\n            \"message\": record.getMessage(),\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        # Standard extras we care about, if present\r\n        for field in (\"service\", \"job_id\", \"stream_id\", \"consumer\", \"attempt\", \"state\"):\r\n            value = getattr(record, field, None)\r\n            if value is not None:\r\n                base[field] = value\r\n\r\n        # Include arbitrary extra dict if provided\r\n        extra: Any = getattr(record, \"extra_fields\", None)\r\n        if isinstance(extra, dict):\r\n            base.update(extra)\r\n\r\n        return json.dumps(base, separators=(\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=False)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef configure_logging(service: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Configure root logging for the given service.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    root = logging.getLogger()\r\n    if root.handlers:\r\n        # Already configured\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    root.setLevel(settings.log_level.upper())\r\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)\r\n    handler.setFormatter(JsonFormatter())\r\n    root.addHandler(handler)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_logger(name: str, *, service: str | None = None) -> logging.Logger:\r\n    \"\"\"Get a logger with a bound service name.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(name)\r\n    if service is not None:\r\n        # Add service name via LoggerAdapter\r\n        return logging.LoggerAdapter(logger, {\"service\": service})  # type: ignore[return-value]\r\n    return logger\r\n\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

Standard extras we care about, if present\r\n        for field in (\"service\", \"job_id\", \"stream_id\", \"consumer\", \"attempt\", \"state\"):\r\n            value = getattr(record, field, None)\r\n            if value is not None:\r\n                base[field] = value\r\n\r\n        # Include arbitrary extra dict if provided\r\n        extra: Any = getattr(record, \"extra_fields\", None)\r\n        if isinstance(extra, dict):\r\n            base.update(extra)\r\n\r\n        return json.dumps(base, separators=(\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=False)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef configure_logging(service: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Configure root logging for the given service.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    root = logging.getLogger()\r\n    if root.handlers:\r\n        # Already configured\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    root.setLevel(settings.log_level.upper())\r\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)\r\n    handler.setFormatter(JsonFormatter())\r\n    root.addHandler(handler)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_logger(name: str, *, service: str | None = None) -> logging.Logger:\r\n    \"\"\"Get a logger with a bound service name.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(name)\r\n    if service is not None:\r\n        # Add service name via LoggerAdapter\r\n        return logging.LoggerAdapter(logger, {\"service\": service})  # type: ignore[return-value]\r\n    return logger\r\n\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
